monitors.name: KALKI WAF - High Block Rate
monitors.message:
{{#is_alert}}KALKI WAF is blocking an anomalously high number of requests ({{value}} blocked/s). Investigate potential attack or false positive rules.{{/is_alert}}
@slack-security

monitors.name: KALKI WAF - Upstream Timeouts
monitors.message:
{{#is_alert}}Upstream server timeouts detected ({{value}}/s). Upstream may be degraded or unreachable.{{/is_alert}}
@slayer-sre

monitors.name: KALKI WAF - Agent Down
monitors.message:
{{#is_alert}}Datadog Agent is unreachable on host {{host.name}}. Metrics, logs, and traces from KALKI WAF may be missing.{{/is_alert}}
@slayer-sre

monitors.name: KALKI WAF - Request Latency P99
monitors.message:
{{#is_alert}}WAF request latency P99 exceeds 5s ({{value}}s). Possible upstream bottleneck or resource exhaustion.{{/is_alert}}
@slayer-sre

monitors.name: KALKI WAF - No Data Received
monitors.message:
{{#is_alert}}No requests observed in the last 5 minutes. WAF may be down or misconfigured.{{/is_alert}}
@slayer-sre
